raw:
{
  "perspective": "Atlas-voice",
  "findings": [
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "ui/components/progress-indicator.jsx", "issue": "Red percentage complete text violates Law 3", "recommended_fix": "Remove 'Profile X% complete' text"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "ui/error-toasts.jsx", "issue": "Red error toast violates Law 3", "recommended_fix": "Replace red with purple error container"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "ui/animations/confetti.jsx", "issue": "Confetti animation violates Law 4", "recommended_fix": "Replace with 12-particle, 1.5s animation"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "ui/buttons/cta-button.jsx", "issue": "Multiple CTAs violate Law 5", "recommended_fix": "Limit to one primary action per screen"},
    {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "ui/leaderboards/leaderboard.jsx", "issue": "Leaderboard violates Crystal Law 5", "recommended_fix": "Remove leaderboard component"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "ui/rewards/badge.jsx", "issue": "Badge system violates Crystal Law 6", "recommended_fix": "Restructure to delay reward visibility"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "api/error-handling.js", "issue": "Missing error container styling", "recommended_fix": "Add purple container styling for all errors"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "ui/notifications/pulse.jsx", "issue": "Infinite pulse animation violates Law 4", "recommended_fix": "Limit to 3 pulses"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "ui/forms/progress.jsx", "issue": "Progress bar violates Law 4", "recommended_fix": "Replace with instant display"},
    {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "ui/animations/spring.jsx", "issue": "Unrestricted spring animation", "recommended_fix": "Restrict to user-initiated actions"}
  ],
  "overall_verdict": "warn",
  "whistleblower_flag": null
}

findings.issue: Red percentage complete text violates Law 3

findings.recommended_fix: Replace red with purple error container
Limit to one primary action per screen
Add purple container styling for all errors
